parsed.final_response: You're really scared that your co-founder will dismiss you again, and that fear is holding you back from making this call. At the same time, you're hoping that talking to him might give you some direction and help you clear the air. It's like you're standing at a crossroads, unsure which path to take. Writing a quick note before the call might be a way to clarify your thoughts and feel more prepared - does that feel like it could be a helpful step to you?
